description_long: This factory building is a sprawling, futuristic industrial complex featuring multiple interconnected structures of varying heights and geometric forms. The exterior is dominated by sleek, white and light gray facades with cyan accent lines, giving it a high-tech, modern industrial appearance. Several large, hexagonal-patterned glass or composite panels are visible, especially on the taller sections, while the central area is marked by a massive cylindrical structure, possibly a processing or transport tunnel. The building is surrounded by smaller annexes, skybridges, and elevated walkways, with scattered greenery and trees at ground level, suggesting an integration of urban landscaping. Numerous large windows and glass panels provide ample natural light, and the rooftops are equipped with visible mechanical installations and antennae. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for a high-capacity, technologically advanced manufacturing or processing facility.
description: A large, futuristic factory complex with white and cyan facades, hexagonal glass panels, a central cylindrical structure, and rooftop machinery. The design is modern industrial, with interconnected buildings and visible urban landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central cylindrical structure, and multiple interconnected buildings with hexagonal glass panels and rooftop machinery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elevated walkways, skybridges, and the depth of the complex, with visible trees and open ground areas.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large cylindrical structure, extensive glass paneling, and the bulk of the factory's main processing areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the tall, angular towers, additional hexagonal glass sections, and more rooftop installations.
